name: Bella Italian Meat Loaf with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces "Bella" sun-dried tomatoes in oil, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the mozzarella cheese in a large bowl.
2. Place the meat mixture into a greased baking pan.
3. Bake for 70 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Remove from the oven and top with mozzarella cheese.
5. Return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
6. Enjoy!
